documentation.description:
Request for terrain data and terrain status. See terrain protocol docs:
https://mavlink.io/en/services/terrain.html

record_types.name: Terrain_Request

fields.name: Lat
fields.description:
Units: [degE7]
Latitude of SW corner of first grid

fields.name: Lon
fields.description:
Units: [degE7]
Longitude of SW corner of first grid

fields.name: Mask
fields.description:
Bitmask of requested 4x4 grids (row major 8x7 array of grids, 56
bits)

subprograms.name: Check_CRC
subprograms.code:
function Check_CRC
  (Connect : in out MAVLink.V1.Connection)
   return Boolean

documentation.description: Returns True if CRC is valid

subprograms.name: Check_CRC
subprograms.code:
function Check_CRC
  (Connect : in out MAVLink.V1.In_Connection)
   return Boolean

documentation.description: Returns True if CRC is valid

subprograms.name: Decode

documentation.description: Same as Above but does not check CRC

subprograms.name: Decode

documentation.description:
Get the message from the Connect and delete it
from the Connect's buffer. CRC_Valid is set to
True if x25crc is valid for the message.
